scripts.check: npm run check:app && npm run sim:smoke && npm run check:tauri
scripts.check:app: tsc --noEmit && eslint . && prettier --check . && vitest run && npm run validate
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run changelog:check
scripts.sim:smoke: npm run sim -- --hours 20 --strategy sane && npm run sim -- --hours 20 --strategy maxer && npm run sim -- --hours 20 --strategy idle_only && npm run sim -- --hours 10 --strategy active && npm run sim -- --hours 10 --strategy casual && npm run sim -- --hours 10 --strategy offline-heavy && npm run sim -- --hours 10 --strategy story-rush
